meta.title: Szélig Tech – Precision CNC Turning & Milling | Hungary
meta.description: Professional CNC turning and milling services in Hungary. Custom and series production, rush orders welcome. Reliable partner in industrial manufacturing.
meta.keywords: CNC turning, CNC milling, Hungary, part manufacturing, metalworking, welding, machine elements

hero.subtitle: Custom and serial CNC part manufacturing to the highest quality standards. Rush orders welcome — flexible and fast.

about.title: A team
about.p1: Our focus is on long-term, reliable partnerships. We respond flexibly to our partners' needs, whether it's urgent work or special, custom orders.
about.p2: Focused on deadlines and quality, our future partners can be confident that they are working with a team built on expertise and flexibility, ready to deliver.
about.p3: Our experience in CNC turning and milling guarantees that every project is carried out to the highest quality standards.
about.mini: Our future partners can be confident that they are working with a skilled and flexible team when fast and precise solutions are required.

services.title: What we
services.description: Complete solutions from manufacturing to assembly.

cnc_forgacsolas.title: CNC Machining
cnc_forgacsolas.description: Precise CNC turning and milling for small, medium, and larger production series, including quantities of several thousand units, as well as custom components.

femipar.title: Metal Assembly and Welding Services
femipar.description: Supporting metalworking operations as part of the manufacturing and assembly process.

gepelemek.title: Machine Elements and Functional Subassemblies
gepelemek.description: Manufacturing and assembly of complete machine elements and functional subassemblies using parts produced in-house.

komplex.title: Complete Solutions from a Single Source
komplex.description: Reliable and flexible execution from manufacturing through to assembly.

portfolio.title: Completed
portfolio.description: A few examples of our machining projects.

contact.title: Request
contact.description: Fill out the form below or contact us directly. We'll get back to you quickly.
contact.subtitle: Get in touch!
contact.subtext: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days. For urgent matters, please call us.
contact.quote: Behind every precise part is always a precise team.

footer.tagline: CNC turning and milling. A reliable partner in industrial part manufacturing.
